content: shadcn CLI (package name 'shadcn', not deprecated 'shadcn-ui') init sets up Tailwind, App Router, @/* alias via prompts. Components added individually via 'npx shadcn@latest add button input card', written into components/ui/ as owned source files (not node_modules deps). Card/Badge/Separator work as Server Components; interactive parts (Dialog, DropdownMenu) are 'use client'. Button/Input are plain client-safe wrappers around native elements.
